atomic_facts.fact: The vegetables are arranged to spell the word 'KVALI'.
The letter K is formed by potatoes on the left.
The letter U is formed by green onions next to the potatoes.
The letter A is formed by bananas in the center.
The letter L is formed by a zucchini and eggplant.
The letter I is formed by an orange pepper on the right.
The text 'www.kvalifood.com' is visible at the bottom of the screen.

spatial: The potatoes forming the letter K are on the far left. The green onions forming the letter U are to the right of the potatoes. The bananas forming the letter A are to the right of the onions. The zucchini and eggplant forming the letter L are to the right of the bananas. The orange pepper forming the letter I is on the far right. The website URL text is below all the vegetable letters.

atomic_facts.fact: The video displays a stop-motion sequence where vegetables and fruits are arranged to spell words.
The letters 'K', 'O', and 'I' are formed by potatoes, spring onions, and bananas respectively.
The letters 'V', 'A', 'C', and 'I' are formed by squash, peppers, leeks, and a stack of potatoes respectively.

spatial: In the first frame, the word 'VACI' is spelled out horizontally across the bottom of the screen using various vegetables. In the second frame, the word 'KOI' is arranged in the upper left area, with the 'K' made of potatoes, the 'O' made of spring onions, and the 'I' made of bananas.

visible_entities.desc: light brown potatoes arranged to form the letter 'K'
green spring onions with white bulbs arranged to form the letter 'V'
yellow bananas arranged to form the letter 'A'
dark green zucchini and black eggplant arranged to form the letter 'L'
long orange chili pepper arranged to form the letter 'I'
text 'www.kvalifood.com' in light green sans-serif font

atomic_facts.fact: The word 'KVALI' is spelled out using various fruits and vegetables.
The text 'www.kvalifood.com' is displayed below the vegetable arrangement.
The background is a plain white surface.

spatial: The potatoes forming the letter 'K' are to the left of the spring onions. The bananas forming the letter 'A' are in the center, between the spring onions and the zucchini. The orange pepper is on the far right. The website URL text is located below all the vegetable letters.

visible_entities.desc: text 'KVALI' formed by vegetables: 'K' made of light-brown eggs, 'V' made of green spring onions, 'A' made of yellow bananas, 'L' made of a dark purple eggplant, and 'I' made of a long orange carrot
text 'www.kvalifood.com' in a white, sans-serif font
